remember: Students will be able to recall and list the different measures of national income.
Students will be able to explain the concept of national income and its importance.
Students will be able to identify and describe the different types of national income.
Students will be able to explain the concept of gross domestic product (GDP) and its components.
Students will be able to calculate national income using the expenditure method and the income method.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of national income and its relevance in macroeconomic analysis.
Students will be able to explain the relationship between national income and economic growth.
Students will be able to understand the concept of GDP deflator and its use in price index calculation.
Students will be able to analyze the limitations of national income as a measure of economic welfare.
apply: Students will be able to apply the formula for calculating national income using the expenditure method.
Students will be able to apply the formula for calculating national income using the income method.
Students will be able to calculate GDP at market price and at factor cost.
Students will be able to apply the concept of GDP deflator in calculating the price index.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the relationship between national income and economic growth.
Students will be able to analyze the limitations of national income as a measure of economic welfare.
Students will be able to analyze the data on national income and economic growth to draw conclusions.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of national income and its different measures.
Discuss the importance of national income in the study of economics.
Explain the concept of GDP and its components.
Calculate national income using the expenditure method and the income method.
board_exam_objectives: Define national income and its importance.
Calculate national income using the expenditure method.
Understand the limitations of national income as a measure of economic welfare.
